name: author-disposition-derivation: rule-8 derivation catches playthrough-7 violations and accepts substantive overrides

source.purpose: Author rule 8 violations from playthrough 7: Corvin (Synod auditor) authored as 'favorable' toward Imperial Warden, Kerys (settlement elder) authored as 'trusted' toward Imperial Warden. Validates that lib/sf2/author/disposition-defaults.ts catches these cases programmatically. Also verifies acceptance of correct dispositions (Vesh as trusted retainer, Seth as wary civilian) and the substantive-override escape hatch.

input.playerInput: (unused — fixture asserts only on disposition derivation)

cases.name: playthrough7-kerys-trusted
cases.flagIncludes: settlement leadership facing an institutional enforcer PC

cases.name: playthrough7-vesh-trusted-correct
cases.affiliation: Imperial Service (sworn to the PC's authority)

cases.name: playthrough7-seth-wary-correct
cases.role: Miner and relative of one of the dead Resonants

cases.name: override-substantive-reason-accepted
cases.dispositionReason: she fought alongside the Warden's father in the prior compliance war

cases.name: playthrough8-ash-undrift-neutral-flagged
cases.role: Intermediary between the settlement and Undrift networks
cases.flagIncludes: Undrift NPC facing institutional system PC
